narrative:
Pleasant Township has 8,674 registered voters, with 57.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 26.8 percentage points.
